title: Why NETSOL | 45+ Years in Asset Finance & Leasing Software
text: Explore NETSOL Technologies With strategically located centers worldwide, we futureproof operations for financial institutions globally. The world's leading brands are powered by NETSOL Our History Serving top companies with smart tech over four decades NETSOL operates globally, serving Fortune 500 companies and SMEs with solutions that futureproof their operations. Specializing in financial applications and digital transformation for the finance and leasing industry, we've expanded into AI-enabled asset finance and cloud services, helping businesses stay competitive with cutting-edge technology. Our timeline 1995 NETSOL begins its journey NETSOL Technologies started with a vision to create superior solutions for the global finance and leasing industry. 2024 1995 1999 1995 1999 2005 2006 2013 2015 2018 2019 2020 2021 2022 2023 2024 Ready to Transcend? Explore our API-first platform for servicing and contract management to streamline operations, strengthen oversight, and future-proof growth. Proven track record NETSOL has a proven track record of successfully meeting deadlines and executing the most complex projects within budget while consistently maintaining the highest quality. To date, the company has maintained its unsurpassed 100% implementation success rate worldwide. $500B+ Assets managed globally Industries Equipment Banks Auto Captive Wholesale Global stats Americas 40+ Years Encino | Austin Committed to quality & excellence NETSOL adheres to global standards with CMMI Level 5 certification and SOC 2 Type 1 & 2 compliance, ensuring secure, high-quality software development across all operations. Accreditions MINI partners with NETSOL to power its new era of auto-retail experience "At MINI, we decided it was time to create an end-to-end purchasing and finance journey for the consumer, and it was important to create something more than a lead generator to facilitate the complete transaction for any MINI customer, any place, any time. Our partnership with NETSOL has enabled us not only to catch up with industry leaders, but also to set new benchmarks in digital auto-retail, which the usual suspects in the industry could not provide." Mike Peyton Chief Motorer and Vice-President of MINI of the Americas Ready to get started? title: NETSOL | Digital Transformation and Resource Augmentation Services
text: Empowering your digital future Fuel your success through strategic talent partnership services and next-gen digital solutions. The world's leading brands are powered by NETSOL Future of Technology Beyond automation, igniting innovation with digital solutions Businesses are etching change with talent management solutions, exploring exponential growth and technological revolution. Data and AI are augmenting human expertise and intelligence. NETSOL unlocks a new dimension of work structure, bridging the gap between human and digital potential. Being your digital technology partners, we foster innovation and agility, equipping you with unparalleled talent, unlocking your organization's potential and propelling your projects forward at an unmatched speed. Quiet quitting In 2024, 'quiet quitting' has become a trend, where over 50% of employees are not ready to put in extra effort. Training disparity 36% of organizations offer quarterly training to employees, but only 5% provide basic training programs. Management failure Poor management leads businesses to lose over $450 billion yearly in productivity. Interview impact 65% of employees lose interest in a job due to a bad interview experience. 50% cost savings NETSOL's efficient on-demand marketing team has a 50% cost saving when compared with in-house hires. Unmatched digital innovation and talent partnership services Digital transformation services Navigating digital transformation and security threats requires expert guidance. NETSOL crafts strategies with AI, cybersecurity, and agile project management. Leverage AI tools, automation, predictive analytics, and reskilling to enhance efficiency and productivity. Resource augmentation For a high-performing team, you need to acquire the best technical talent. With NETSOL, break the chains of geographical limitations and find the talent with our onshore, nearshore, and offshore resource augmentation, assisting in hiring the best talent Support services Smooth operations and exceptional customer support are critical for your business growth.With our digital partnerships, we optimize efficiency by leveraging AI-enabled, proactive maintenance and management, and service training for your brand. NETSOL offers to power your business with intelligent configuration and workflow automation, undisrupted data migration, and AI-enabled training and user adoption. Training & development Continuous learning and development are essential for an enhanced development system. Unlock personalized learning journeys by analyzing skill gaps and infusing adaptive learning, microlearning, and real-time performance management with us. Technical services & solutions Managing technical services requires expertise. With our digital consulting and talent solutions, fuel your business with AI-enabled infrastructure management, development and automation, future-ready technological revolution, and AI-assisted resolution. title: Transcend | AI-Enabled Asset Finance Platform for Captives & Lenders
text: Transcend the limits of technology From AI-enabled finance solutions to seamless digital retail. The world's leading brands are powered by NETSOL Transcend Platform Powering the future of finance, retail and beyond The Transcend Platform by NETSOL is a unified, AI-driven ecosystem built to simplify and optimize every stage of the asset, retail, and commerce lifecycle. From originations to servicing, collections, and customer engagement, Transcend enables lenders, OEMs, dealers, and fleets to scale with confidence, integrate seamlessly with partner systems, and deliver connected experiences across markets, products, and touchpoints. Grounded in responsible AI and composable design, it transforms complexity into clarity, helping businesses achieve measurable outcomes while ensuring trust, transparency, and collaboration at every step. AI at the core Harness artificial intelligence and machine learning to power predictive insights, automated workflows and risk management across the finance ecosystem. An adaptive platform Future-ready infrastructure Enterprise-level security Tailored solutions for every stage of your business An AI-driven, composable platform for lenders, OEMs, dealers and fleets uniting digital retail, asset finance, and loan servicing with trust and transparency. Digital Retail Finance AI Labs Marketplace Consultancy Transcend Retail The ultimate lead generation and retail enablement platform, helping OEMs and dealers capture, qualify, and convert customers across digital and in-store journeys. Learn More Auto retail redefined. Personalized paths, connected touchpoints and AI-driven precision. From deployment to optimization, our specialists help you get the most out of Transcend with faster rollouts and higher ROI. Ongoing support One platform. Every stakeholder. Connect lenders, brokers, field agents, and customers in a single ecosystem that drives collaboration and transparency across the finance and leasing lifecycle. Omnichannel journeys Mobile tools for field teams Real-time workflow sync Self-service portals AI-enabled. API-connected. Cloud-native. Transcend is built for scale and speed with architecture that adapts to your business and integrates with your systems.
